control.rationale: Clear and standard breakdown using Pinia, Composables, and Provide/Inject.

fable_compressed.rationale: Very similar to Control; effectively laid out the 3 primary approaches.

fable_raw.rationale: Perfectly followed the prose-only constraint while delivering accurate technical advice.

fable_innovations.rationale: Fantastic business perspective on monetizing Vue 3 migration tools and enterprise boilerplates. Properly identified Pinia as consensus and native API as the contrarian view.
